What We Supply

Our Product Range

Genuine and OEM-quality parts for Toyota 8FG / 8FB / 7FG series and more.

🧰

Oil Filters

Toyota 15601-76008 compatible and cross-referenced alternatives for all major forklift brands.

From $32
🌬

Air Filters

High-flow air filtration for Toyota, Crown, Hyster and Yale LPG and electric forklifts.

From $45
⛽

Fuel Filters

Inline fuel filters for LPG and diesel forklift engines. Exact OEM part number matching.

From $30
💧

Hydraulic Filters & Seals

System filters, return-line filters and seal kits for mast and cylinder assemblies.

From $78
💡

LED Work Lights

High-lumen round and square LED lights. IP67 rated, direct-fit brackets included.

From $65
⚡

Spark Plugs & Ignition

NGK-spec plugs, ignition switches and full ignition kits for 4Y-E and similar LPG engines.

From $18
🔴

Brake Components

Brake pads, disc kits and master cylinders. Wet-brake compatible for Toyota oil-bath systems.

From $45
🔔

Horns & Electrical Parts

Forklift-grade 12/24V horns, fuses, relays, starter motors and alternators.

From $35
🔧

Gaskets & Engine Seals

Valve cover gaskets, oil pan gaskets, hub seals and crankshaft seals. Fast ship from Sydney stock.

From $26

Why Choose Us

The YL Advantage

We built this business to solve the problems forklift operators face every day.

01

Same-Day Sydney Delivery

Order before noon and receive your parts the same afternoon. We keep stock in Sydney — no waiting weeks for international freight.

02

No Minimum Order

Need just one oil filter? No problem. We supply single items through to fleet quantities with no MOQ restrictions.

03

30–50% Below Dealer Price

Our direct supply chain means you pay significantly less than retail without compromising on OEM-grade quality.

04

PhD Technical Support

Dr. Louis Liu provides expert fitment advice and part identification — so you get the right part first time, every time.

Simple Process

How to Order

Three easy steps — from inquiry to delivery at your door.

1

Tell Us What You Need

Call, text or email with your forklift model and serial number, or the OEM part number. We'll confirm compatibility instantly.

2

Receive Your Quote

Get a clear quote within the hour — unit price, delivery time and total. No hidden fees. Pay by bank transfer or EFT.

3

Same-Day Delivery

Confirm your order before noon and we'll dispatch from our Sydney stock the same day. Tracking provided on every order.

About Us

Built for Forklift Operators

YL Specialist Engineering Pty Ltd is a Sydney-based supplier of OEM-quality Toyota forklift parts. We specialise in the Toyota 8FG, 8FB and 7FG series — the most widely-used forklifts in Australian warehouses and logistics centres.

Founded by Dr. Louis Liu, we exist to solve a real problem: dealer parts are expensive and slow. We source direct from trusted Chinese manufacturers with 30+ years of OEM supply experience, bringing the same quality to you at a fraction of the dealer price — with same-day Sydney delivery.

Whether you're a fleet manager maintaining 50 machines or a small operator who needs one filter urgently, we treat every order the same — fast, expert and reliable.
